{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Iron core
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon's madra]] flows from his [[Iron core]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has an [[Iron core]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
